description: Low-power sub-1 GHz RF transceiver for ISM/SRD bands, SPI interface

fields.name: SRES
fields.description: Strobe to reset the CC1101 chip

Command Strobes.name: SFSTXON
Command Strobes.description: Command strobe. Frequency synthesizer on and ready at TX frequency. Activate TX with STX.

fields.name: SFSTXON
fields.description: Fast TX on strobe command

Command Strobes.name: SXOFF
Command Strobes.description: Exit RX / TX, turn off crystal oscillator command strobe

fields.name: SXOFF
fields.description: Strobe to exit RX/TX and turn off crystal oscillator

fields.name: SRX
fields.description: Strobe to enable RX mode

fields.name: RSSI
fields.description: Received signal strength indicator

fields.name: SIDLE
fields.description: Strobe to enter IDLE state, clears pending strobes

fields.name: SPWD
fields.description: Strobe to enter power-down/SLEEP mode

fields.name: SNOP
fields.description: No operation strobe

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: RCCTRL0_STATUS
fields.description: Contains the value from the last run of the RC oscillator calibration routine.

fields.name: CRC_OK
fields.description: The last CRC comparison matched. Cleared when entering/restarting RX mode.

fields.name: LQI_EST
fields.description: The Link Quality Indicator estimates how easily a received signal can be demodulated. Calculated over the 64 symbols following the sync word

Status Registers.name: MARCSTATE
Status Registers.description: Main Radio Control State Machine State

fields.description: Not used

fields.name: MARC_STATE
fields.description: Main Radio Control FSM State

Status Registers.name: WORTIME0

fields.name: TIME
fields.description: Low byte of timer value in WORmodule

quality_issues: address 0x37 not found in register summary table

Status Registers.name: PKTSTATUS
Status Registers.description: Current GDOx Status and Packet Status

fields.name: CRC_OK
fields.description: The last CRC comparison matched. Cleared when entering/restarting RX mode.

fields.name: CS
fields.description: Carrier sense. Cleared when entering IDLE mode.

fields.name: PQT_REACHED
fields.description: Preamble Quality reached.

fields.name: CCA
fields.description: Channel is clear

fields.name: SFD
fields.description: Start of Frame Delimiter.

fields.name: GDO2
fields.description: Current GDO2 value.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: GDO0
fields.description: Current GDO0 value.

fields.name: NUM_TXBYTES
fields.description: Number of bytes in TX FIFO

fields.name: NUM_RXBYTES
fields.description: Number of bytes in RX FIFO
Not used

fields.name: GDO2_INV
fields.description: Invert output, i.e. select active low (1) / high (0)

fields.name: GDO2_CFG
fields.description: Default is CHP_RDYn (See Table 41 on page 62).

fields.name: GDO_DS
fields.description: Set high (1) or low (0) output drive strength on the GDO pins.

fields.name: GDO1_INV
fields.description: Invert output, i.e. select active low (1) / high (0)

fields.name: GDO1_CFG
fields.description: Default is 3-state (See Table 41 on page 62).

fields.name: TEMP_SENSOR_ENABLE
fields.description: Enable analog temperature sensor. Write 0 in all other register bits when using temperature sensor.

fields.name: GDO0_INV
fields.description: Invert output, i.e. select active low (1) / high (0)

fields.name: GDO0_CFG
fields.description: Default is CLK_XOSC/192 (See Table 41 on page 62). It is recommended to disable the clock output in initialization, in order to optimize RF performance.

Packet Handling.name: FIFOTHR
Packet Handling.description: RX FIFO and TX FIFO Thresholds

fields.description: Reserved , write 0 for compatibility with possible future extensions

fields.name: ADC_RETENTION
fields.description: 0: TEST1 = 0x31 and TEST2= 0x88 when waking up from SLEEP 1: TEST1 = 0x35 and TEST2 = 0x81 when waking up from SLEEP

fields.name: CLOSE_IN_RX
fields.description: For more details, please see DN010 [8]

fields.name: FIFO_THR
fields.description: Set the threshold for the TX FIFO and RX FIFO. The threshold is exceeded when the number of bytes in the FIFO is equal to or higher than

fields.name: PACKET_LENGTH
fields.description: Indicates the packet length when fixed packet length mode is enabled. If variable packet length mode is used, this value indicates the maximum packet length allowed. This value must be different from 0.

fields.name: PQT[2:0]
fields.description: Preamble quality estimator threshold. The preamble quality estimator increases an internal counter by one each time a bit is received that is different from the previous bit, and decreases the counter by 8 each time a bit is received that is the same as the last bit. A threshold of 4∙ PQT for this counter is used to gate sync word detection.

fields.name: NOT_USED
fields.description: Not Used.

fields.name: CRC_AUTOFLUSH
fields.description: Enable automatic flush of RX FIFO when CRC is not OK. This requires that only one packet is in the RXIFIFO and that packet length is limited to the RX FIFO size.

fields.name: APPEND_STATUS
fields.description: When enabled, two status bytes will be appended to the payload of the packet. The status bytes contain RSSI and LQI values, as well as CRC OK.

fields.name: ADR_CHK[1:0]
fields.description: Controls address check configuration of received packages.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: WHITE_DATA
fields.description: Turn data whitening on / off

fields.name: PKT_FORMAT
fields.description: Format of RX and TX data

enum_values.0b01: Synchronous serial mode, Data in on GDO0 and data out on either of the GDOx pins
enum_values.0b10: Random TX mode; sends random data using PN9 generator. Used for test. Works as normal mode, setting 0 (00), in RX

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: CRC_EN
fields.description: 1: CRC calculation in TX and CRC check in RX enabled

fields.name: LENGTH_CONFIG
fields.description: Configure the packet length

enum_values.0b00: Fixed packet length mode. Length configured in PKTLEN register
enum_values.0b01: Variable packet length mode. Packet length configured by the first byte after sync word

fields.name: ADDR
fields.description: Device address

fields.name: CHANBW_E
fields.description: Sets the decimation ratio for the delta-sigma ADC input stream and thus the channel bandwidth

fields.name: CHANBW_M
fields.description: Sets the decimation ratio for the delta-sigma ADC input stream and thus the channel bandwidth

fields.name: DRATE_E
fields.description: The exponent of the user specified symbol rate

fields.name: DRATE_M
fields.description: The mantissa of the user specified symbol rate. The symbol rate is configured using an unsigned, floating-point number with 9-bit mantissa and 4-bit exponent.

fields.name: DEM_DCFILT_OFF
fields.description: Disable digital DC blocking filter before demodulator. 0 = Enable (better sensitivity)

fields.name: MOD_FORMAT
fields.description: The modulation format of the radio signal

fields.name: MANCHESTER_EN
fields.description: Enables Manchester encoding/decoding. 0 = Disable 1 = Enable Combined sync-word qualifier mode.

fields.name: SYNC_MODE
fields.description: Sync-word qualifier mode

fields.name: FEC_EN
fields.description: Enable Forward Error Correction (FEC) with interleaving for packet payload

fields.name: NUM_PREAMBLE
fields.description: Sets the minimum number of preamble bytes to be transmitted

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: CHANSPC_E
fields.description: 2 bit exponent of channel spacing

fields.name: CHANSPC_M
fields.description: 8-bit mantissa of channel spacing

fields.name: DEVIATION_E
fields.description: Deviation exponent

fields.name: DEVIATION_M
fields.description: Deviation mantissa for TX/RX

fields.name: NOT_USED_7
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: NOT_USED_3
fields.description: Not used

Modem Configuration.name: MCSM2
Modem Configuration.description: Main Radio Control State Machine Configuration

fields.name: RX_TIME_RSSI
fields.description: Direct RX termination based on RSSI measurement (carrier sense). For ASK/OOK modulation, RX times out if there is no carrier sense in the first 8 symbol periods.

fields.name: RX_TIME_QUAL
fields.description: When the RX_TIME timer expires, the chip checks if sync word is found when RX_TIME_QUAL=0 , or either sync word is found or PQI is set when RX_TIME_QUAL=1.

fields.name: RX_TIME
fields.description: Timeout for sync word search in RX for both WORmode and normal RX operation. The timeout is relative to the programmed EVENT0 timeout.

fields.name: RSVD_7_5
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: CHAN
fields.description: The 8-bit unsigned channel number, which is multiplied by the channel spacing setting and added to the base frequency

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FREQ_IF
fields.description: The desired IF frequency to employ in RX. Subtracted from FS base frequency in RX and controls the digital complex mixer in the demodulator. IF FREQ f f_XOSC IF _ 2 10   The default value gives an IF frequency of 381kHz, assuming a 26.0 MHz crystal.

fields.name: RSVD_7_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: FREQOFF
fields.description: Frequency offset added to the base frequency before being used by the frequency synthesizer. (2s-complement)

fields.name: FREQ
fields.description: FREQ[23:22] is always 0 (the FREQ2 register is less than 36 with 26-27 MHz crystal)

fields.name: FREQ_21_16
fields.description: FREQ[21:16] FREQ[23:0] is the base frequency for the frequency synthesiser in increments of f_XOSC /2^16

fields.name: FREQ
fields.description: Ref. FREQ2 register

fields.name: FREQ
fields.description: Ref. FREQ2 register

fields.name: MAX_DVGA_GAIN
fields.description: Reduces the maximum allowable DVGA gain.

enum_values.0b00: All gain settings can be used
enum_values.0b01: The highest gain setting can not be used
enum_values.0b10: The 2 highest gain settings can not be used
enum_values.0b11: The 3 highest gain settings can not be used

fields.name: MAX_LNA_GAIN
fields.description: Sets the maximum allowable LNA + LNA 2 gain relative to the maximum possible gain.

enum_values.0b001: Approx. 2.6 dB below maximum possible gain
enum_values.0b010: Approx. 6.1 dB below maximum possible gain
enum_values.0b011: Approx. 7.4 dB below maximum possible gain
enum_values.0b100: Approx. 9.2 dB below maximum possible gain
enum_values.0b101: Approx. 11.5 dB below maximum possible gain
enum_values.0b110: Approx. 14.6 dB below maximum possible gain
enum_values.0b111: Approx. 17.1 dB below maximum possible gain

fields.name: MAGN_TARGET
fields.description: These bits set the target value for the averaged amplitude from the digital channel filter (1 LSB = 0 dB).
Not used

fields.name: AGC_LNA_PRIORITY
fields.description: Selects between two different strategies for LNA and LNA 2 gain adjustment. When 1, the LNA gain is decreased first. When 0, the LNA 2 gain is decreased to minimum before decreasing LNA gain.

fields.name: CARRIER_SENSE_REL_THR
fields.description: Sets the relative change threshold for asserting carrier sense

fields.name: CARRIER_SENSE_ABS_THR
fields.description: Sets the absolute RSSI threshold for asserting carrier sense. The 2-complement signed threshold is programmed in steps of 1 dB and is relative to the MAGN_TARGET setting.

fields.name: HYST_LEVEL
fields.description: Sets the level of hysteresis on the magnitude deviation (internal AGC signal that determine gain changes).

enum_values.0b00: No hysteresis, small symmetric dead zone, high gain
enum_values.0b01: Low hysteresis, small asymmetric dead zone, medium gain
enum_values.0b10: Medium hysteresis, medium asymmetric dead zone, medium gain
enum_values.0b11: Large hysteresis, large asymmetric dead zone, low gain

fields.name: WAIT_TIME
fields.description: Sets the number of channel filter samples from a gain adjustment has been made until the AGC algorithm starts accumulating new samples.

fields.name: AGC_FREEZE
fields.description: Control when the AGC gain should be frozen.

enum_values.0b00: Normal operation. Always adjust gain when required.
enum_values.0b01: The gain setting is frozen when a sync word has been found.
enum_values.0b10: Manually freeze the analogue gain setting and continue to adjust the digital gain.
enum_values.0b11: Manually freezes both the analogue and the digital gain setting. Used for manually overriding the gain.

fields.name: FILTER_LENGTH
fields.description: 2-FSK, 4-FSK, MSK: Sets the averaging length for the amplitude from the channel filter. ASK, OOK: Sets the OOK/ASK decision boundary for OOK/ASK reception.

fields.name: LNA_CURRENT
fields.description: Adjusts front-end LNA PTAT current output

fields.name: LNA2MIX_CURRENT
fields.description: Adjusts front-end PTAT outputs

fields.name: LODIV_BUF_CURRENT_RX
fields.description: Adjusts current in RX LO buffer (LO input to mixer)

fields.name: MIX_CURRENT
fields.description: Adjusts current in mixer

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: LODIV_BUF_CURRENT_TX
fields.description: Adjusts current TX LO buffer (input to PA). The value to use in this field is given by the SmartRF Studio software [5].

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: PA_POWER
fields.description: Selects PA power setting. This value is an index to the PATABLE , which can be programmed with up to 8 different PA settings. In OOK/ASK mode, this selects the PATABLE index to use when transmitting a '1'. PATABLE index zero is used in OOK/ASK when transmitting a '0'. The PATABLE settings from index '0' to the PA_POWER value are used for ASK TX shaping, and for power ramp-up/ramp-down at the start/end of transmission in all TX modulation formats.

fields.name: FSCAL3
fields.description: Frequency synthesizer calibration configuration. The value to write in this field before calibration is given by the SmartRF Studio software.

fields.name: CHP_CURR_CAL_EN
fields.description: Disable charge pump calibration stage when 0.

fields.name: FSCAL3_LO
fields.description: Frequency synthesizer calibration result register. Digital bit vector defining the charge pump output current, on an exponential scale: I_OUT = I_0 ·2^FSCAL3[3:0]/4 Fast frequency hopping without calibration for each hop can be done by calibrating upfront for each frequency and saving the resulting FSCAL3 , FSCAL2 and FSCAL1 register values. Between each frequency hop, calibration can be replaced by writing the FSCAL3 , FSCAL2 and FSCAL1 register values corresponding to the next RF frequency.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: VCO_CORE_H_EN
fields.description: Choose high (1) / low (0) VCO

fields.name: FSCAL2
fields.description: Frequency synthesizer calibration result register. VCO current calibration result and override value. Fast frequency hopping without calibration for each hop can be done by calibrating upfront for each frequency and saving the resulting FSCAL3 , FSCAL2 and FSCAL1 register values. Between each frequency hop, calibration can be replaced by writing the FSCAL3 , FSCAL2 and FSCAL1 register values corresponding to the next RF frequency.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: FSCAL1
fields.description: Frequency synthesizer calibration result register. Capacitor array setting for VCO coarse tuning. Fast frequency hopping without calibration for each hop can be done by calibrating upfront for each frequency and saving the resulting FSCAL3 , FSCAL2 and FSCAL1 register values. Between each frequency hop, calibration can be replaced by writing the FSCAL3 , FSCAL2 and FSCAL1 register values corresponding to the next RF frequency.
Not used

fields.name: FSCAL0
fields.description: Frequency synthesizer calibration control. The value to use in this register is given by the SmartRF Studio software [5].

fields.name: SYNC[15:8]
fields.description: 8 MSB of 16-bit sync word

fields.name: SYNC[7:0]
fields.description: 8 LSB of 16-bit sync word

State Machine.name: MCSM1
State Machine.description: Main Radio Control State Machine Configuration

fields.name: CCA_MODE
fields.description: Clear channel indication mode

fields.name: RXOFF_MODE
fields.description: Next state after RX

fields.name: TXOFF_MODE
fields.description: Next state after TX

fields.name: RSVD_7_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: EVENT0
fields.description: Event 0 mantissa value

fields.name: EVENT0
fields.description: Event 0 mantissa value

fields.name: RC_PD
fields.description: Power down signal to RC oscillator. When written to 0, automatic initial calibration will be performed

fields.name: EVENT1[2:0]
fields.description: Timeout setting from register block. Decoded to Event 1 timeout. RC oscillator clock frequency equals F_XOSC /750

fields.name: RC_CAL
fields.description: Enables (1) or disables (0) the RC oscillator calibration.

fields.name: NOT_USED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: WOR_RES
fields.description: Controls the Event 0 resolution as well as maximum timeout of the WOR module and maximum timeout under normal RX operation
Not used

fields.name: RCCTRL1
fields.description: RC oscillator configuration.
Not used

fields.name: RCCTRL0
fields.description: RC oscillator configuration.

fields.name: FSTEST
fields.description: For test only. Do not write to this register.

fields.name: PTEST
fields.description: Writing 0xBF to this register makes the on-chip temperature sensor available in the IDLE state. The default 0x7F value should then be written back before leaving the IDLE state. Other use of this register is for test only.

fields.name: AGCTEST
fields.description: For test only. Do not write to this register.

fields.name: TEST2
fields.description: The value to use in this register is given by the SmartRF Studio software [5]. This register will be forced to 0x88 or 0x81 when it wakes up from SLEEP mode, depending on the configuration of FIFOTHR. ADC_RETENTION. Note that the value read from this register when waking up from SLEEP always is the reset value (0x88) regardless of the ADC_RETENTION setting. The inverting of some of the bits due to the ADC_RETENTION setting is only seen INTERNALLY in the analog part.

fields.name: TEST1
fields.description: Test register

fields.name: TEST0[7:2]
fields.description: The value to use in this register is given by the SmartRF Studio software [5].

fields.name: VCO_SEL_CAL_EN
fields.description: Enable VCO selection calibration stage when 1

fields.name: TEST0[0]
fields.description: The value to use in this register is given by the SmartRF Studio software [5].
Not used

fields.name: FOC_BS_CS_GATE
fields.description: If set, the demodulator freezes the frequency offset compensation and clock recovery feedback loops until the CS signal goes high.

fields.name: FOC_PRE_K
fields.description: The frequency compensation loop gain to be used before a sync word is detected.

fields.name: FOC_POST_K
fields.description: The frequency compensation loop gain to be used after a sync word is detected.

fields.name: FOC_LIMIT
fields.description: The saturation point for the frequency offset compensation algorithm.

fields.name: BS_PRE_KI
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop integral gain to be used before a sync word is detected (used to correct offsets in data rate).

fields.name: BS_PRE_KP
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop proportional gain to be used before a sync word is detected.

fields.name: BS_POST_KI
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop integral gain to be used after a sync word is detected.

fields.name: BS_POST_KP
fields.description: The clock recovery feedback loop proportional gain to be used after a sync word is detected.

fields.name: BS_LIMIT
fields.description: The saturation point for the data rate offset compensation algorithm.

fields.name: RESERVED
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: RCCTRL1_STATUS
fields.description: Contains the value from the last run of the RC oscillator calibration routine.

fields.name: RCCTRL0_STATUS
fields.description: Contains the value from the last run of the RC oscillator calibration routine. For usage description refer to Application Note AN047 [4].

fields.name: Not used
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: RSVD_7_1
fields.description: Reserved

Main Radio Control State Machine.name: MCSM0
Main Radio Control State Machine.description: Main Radio Control State Machine Configuration

fields.name: FS_AUTOCAL
fields.description: Automatically calibrate when going to RX or TX, or back to IDLE

enum_values.0b01: When going from IDLE to RX or TX (or FSTXON)
enum_values.0b10: When going from RX or TX back to IDLE automatically
enum_values.0b11: Every 4th time when going from RX or TX to IDLE automatically

fields.name: PO_TIMEOUT
fields.description: Programs the number of times the six-bit ripple counter must expire after XOSC has stabilized before CHP_RDYn goes low [1].

fields.name: PIN_CTRL_EN
fields.description: Enables the pin radio control option

fields.name: XOSC_FORCE_ON
fields.description: Force the XOSC to stay on in the SLEEP state.

fields.name: RSVD_7_6
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: PARTNUM
fields.description: Chip part number

fields.name: RSVD_7_1
fields.description: Reserved

fields.name: VERSION
fields.description: Chip version number. Subject to change without notice.

fields.name: FREQOFF_EST
fields.description: The estimated frequency offset (2's complement) of the carrier. Resolution is F_XTAL /2 14 (1.59 - 1.65 kHz); range is ±202 kHz to ±210 kHz, depending on XTAL frequency. Frequency offset compensation is only supported for 2-FSK, GFSK, 4-FSK, and MSK modulation. This register will read 0 when using ASK or OOK modulation.

fields.name: CRC_OK
fields.description: The last CRC comparison matched. Cleared when entering/restarting RX mode.

fields.name: LQI_EST
fields.description: The Link Quality Indicator estimates how easily a received signal can be demodulated. Calculated over the 64 symbols following the sync word

fields.name: RSSI
fields.description: Received signal strength indicator

fields.name: RSVD_7_5
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: MARC_STATE
fields.description: Main Radio Control FSM State

fields.name: TIME[15:8]
fields.description: High byte of timer value in WORmodule

fields.name: TIME
fields.description: Low byte of timer value in WORmodule

fields.name: CRC_OK
fields.description: The last CRC comparison matched. Cleared when entering/restarting RX mode.

fields.name: CS
fields.description: Carrier sense. Cleared when entering IDLE mode.

fields.name: PQT_REACHED
fields.description: Preamble Quality reached. If leaving RX state when this bit is set it will remain asserted until the chip re-enters RX state ( MARCSTATE=0x0D ). The bit will also be cleared if PQI goes below the programmed PQT value.

fields.name: CCA
fields.description: Channel is clear

fields.name: SFD
fields.description: Start of Frame Delimiter. In RX, this bit is asserted when sync word has been received and de-asserted at the end of the packet. It will also de- assert when a packet is discarded due to address or maximum length filtering or the radio enters RXFIFO_OVERFLOW state. In TX this bit will always read as 0.

fields.name: GDO2
fields.description: Current GDO2 value. Note: the reading gives the non-inverted value irrespective of what IOCFG2.GDO2_INV is programmed to. It is not recommended to check for PLL lock by reading PKTSTATUS[2] with GDO2_CFG=0x0A .

fields.name: RSVD_1
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: GDO0
fields.description: Current GDO0 value. Note: the reading gives the non-inverted value irrespective of what IOCFG0.GDO0_INV is programmed to. It is not recommended to check for PLL lock by reading PKTSTATUS[0] with GDO0_CFG=0x0A .

fields.name: VCO_VC_DAC
fields.description: Status register for test only.

fields.name: NUM_TXBYTES
fields.description: Number of bytes in TX FIFO

fields.name: NUM_RXBYTES
fields.description: Number of bytes in RX FIFO

fields.name: RSVD_7
fields.description: Not used

fields.name: RCCTRL1_STATUS
fields.description: Contains the value from the last run of the RC oscillator calibration routine. For usage description refer to Application Note AN047 [4]
